programme.desc: Barry Cryer pays tribute to pioneering stand-up comedian Billy Connolly, who also appeared in films including Mrs Brown, The Last Samurai and Indecent Proposal

programme.title: Fanny: The Other Mendelssohn
programme.desc: Documentary about one of the unsung heroines of classical music, with several of her greatest works often misattributed to her celebrated brother Felix. The film explores sexism in the music worlds of both 1840s and the present day and features recordings of her work by Isata Kanneh-Mason

programme.title: The World in a Painting: Velazquezs Chili Pepper
programme.desc: Documentary tracing the adventures, conquests, tragic experiences and artistic inventions that allowed a pepper to appear in Velázquezs Christ in the House of Martha and Mary.

programme.title: Auction
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of a sale of the Queen frontmans personal effects at Sothebys in London, telling his story through the items up for auction. Spanning art, fashion, musical instruments, personal papers and possessions, candid photographs, furniture, and jewels, accrued over the course of 50 years, the sales allowed the public to bid for a piece of rock n roll history

programme.title: Yuja x Hockney at Lightroom London
programme.desc: A concert in which internationally acclaimed classical pianist Yuja Wang plays pieces inspired by her responsed to David Hockneys artworks

programme.title: The Joy of Painting
programme.desc: Bob Ross depicts a sunset with the warm light in the sky and clouds making a glowing, fiery landscape as he teaches the use of his technique on black canvas

programme.title: Artist of the Year: Masterclass
programme.desc: Tutorials for budding artists, with each edition focusing on a different subject or technique, while Tai-Shan Schierenberg has tips on painting portraits

programme.title: Artist of the Year: Masterclass
programme.desc: Tutorials by painters from both Portrait and Landscape Artist of the Year series, helping viewers understand the basics of painting and drawing

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Vietnam veteran Fred Pearson is a broken man after years of punishment from his sergeant, but years later he gets his chance for revenge. Kevin Dobson and George Peppard star

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.sub-title: The Best Chess Player in the World
programme.desc: A chess game gets out of control when one of the players learns his wife has been unfaithful

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A reporter taking a trip to Egypt describes his past connection to arms trafficking to a fellow passenger, who knows part of his story is untrue

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A homicide detective is befriended by four elderly women, who invite him for tea and proceed to play out a variation of Arsenic and Old Lace for his benefit

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A profile of the American actor, who rose to fame with his roles in Big and Splash and won Best Actor Oscars for Philadelphia and Forrest Gump

programme.title: Andre Rieu
programme.desc: The Dutch violinist is joined by his Johann Strauss Orchestra as he heads home to Maastricht to perform in front of thousands of fans in the towns historic square

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A chauffeur offers his wealthy employer a solution to an impending scandal

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A successful author receives threatening phone calls

programme.title: Thomas Hardy: Fate, Exclusion and Tragedy
programme.desc: A look at the authors complex personal life, examining how his relationship with his wife informed classics such as Far from the Madding Crowd and Jude the Obscure

programme.title: Classic Albums
programme.desc: A deep dive into the making of the critically acclaimed record considered one of the top reggae albums of all time from Bob Marley and The Wailers.

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of the American actor, who starred in Cry Freedom, Malcolm X and The Hurricane, and won Oscars for his roles in Glory and Training Day

programme.title: Portrait Artist of the Year
programme.sub-title: Portrait Artist of the Year 2014 - Painting Alan Cumming
programme.desc: Following Christian Hook as he takes on his £10,000 prize commission to paint actor Alan Cumming for the Scottish National Portrait Gallery. Travelling to New York, the victorious artist spends three days painting study portraits of Cumming, as well as learning how The Good Wife stars mind ticks, before everything culminates at a reception where the final portrait is unveiled

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A driver picks up a hitch-hiker, before hearing on the radio that a serial killer is on the loose

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.sub-title: The Last of the Midnight Gardeners
programme.desc: A competition to find the best murder story attracts an unusually high level of attention. Jane Asher and Patrick Mower star

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A bookmaker blackmails a man who faked his own death to collect insurance money, but finds the mans wife wants a share. With Robert Horton and Betsy von Furstenberg

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Mary Maloneys police chief husband is found dead, but the officers investigating run into difficulties trying to find the murder weapon. With Barbara Bel Geddes and Harold J Stone

programme.title: Thomas Hardy: Fate, Exclusion and Tragedy
programme.desc: A look at the authors complex personal life, examining how his relationship with his wife informed classics such as Far from the Madding Crowd and Jude the Obscure

programme.title: National Theatre Live: Much Ado About Nothing
programme.desc: When a hotel owners daughter weds a soldier, not all guests are in the mood for love. A 2022 performance of Shakespeares comedy, starring Katherine Parkinson and John Heffernan

programme.title: Garbo: Where Did You Go?
programme.desc: A portrait of Hollywood icon Greta Garbo, exploring her fame, famous isolation and her decision to retire from acting. This documentary includes previously unseen archive footage, letters from Garbo, and re-enactments of her life. Narrated by Noomi Rapace

programme.title: Hammer: Heroes, Legends and Monsters
programme.desc: Documentary charting the history of the film production company from its origins in a back office in Londons Regent Street to its iconic status within the horror film genre

programme.title: The Pilgrimage of Gilbert and George
programme.desc: A profile of the art duo who have been at the forefront of British art for over half a century, weaving together interviews with historic and rare archive to create an engrossing reflection on their journey

programme.title: Up Late with Nicola Benedetti
programme.desc: The first of two concerts recorded at the Edinburgh International Festival Hub, with the violin virtuoso joined by Orquesta la Pasion, Schola Cantorum de Venezuela, sarod player Soumik Datta, the Leonore Piano Trio and mezzo Sarah Connolly

programme.title: Heated Rivalry
programme.desc: Shane and Ilya keep their secret fling alive while their growing connection is tested by personal and professional pressures

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.desc: Floyds ego takes a hit after a failed attempt to reconnect with Carol, leading Clark to help his friend using the DTF app. Black comedy, starring David Harbour

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.sub-title: No Ones Normal. It Just Looks That Way from Across the Street
programme.desc: With Tiger Tiger out of the picture, Clark proposes a new plan, while Plumb and Homer are forced to question everything they thought they knew about the case after a series of revelations

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Drama offering a look at the complexities of life in a social-media obsessed world, starring Zendaya, Jacob Elordi and Sydney Sweeney

programme.title: Atomic
programme.desc: Drug smuggler Max and outsider on the run JJ forge an unlikely friendship when they become caught up in a cartels plot to transport uranium across north Africa. Action adventure based on William Langewiesches non-fiction book Atomic Bazaar, starring Alfie Allen and Shazad Latif

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: A cameraman who was at the scene of a murder believes he may have caught the perpetrator on tape. Gritty police drama, starring Daniel Baldwin and Kyle Secor

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming heads across the Irish Sea to Dublin, where he succumbs to the citys famous charm and meets some of its most fascinating characters. On a journey that takes in an 18th-century pleasure house and a burlesque life-painting class, Alan also stops off in Temple Bar for a pint with singer Sharon Corr, unlocks a mystery in Irelands oldest library and uncovers a stylish secret that lurks behind the steel shutters of an old lock-up

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor heads to Tokyo and checks out the Park Hyatt, the hotel featured in the film Lost in Translation, and goes behind the closed doors of the Japanese capitals love hotels. In the fashionable district of Meguro, Richard takes in the Claska, which was the citys first boutique hotel and has its own canine beauty salon

programme.title: Dune: Prophecy
programme.desc: On Wallach IX, young Valya Harkonnen promises Mother Superior Raquella that shell protect the Sisterhood by putting one of their own on the imperial throne. Thirty years later, on Salusa Secundus, Valya works to combat a new threat to her long-awaited plan for a marriage between Princess Ynez-Arat and a young Richese prince. Sci-fi prequel, starring Emily Watson, Olivia Williams and Mark Strong

programme.title: Dune: Prophecy
programme.desc: After receiving word about events on Salusa Secundus, Valya brings Theodosia to the Imperial House to help manage the situation. Meanwhile, Desmond makes a confession to Emperor Corrino, Tula reluctantly enlists Lila for a vital mission, and distrust swirls around Keiran Atreides, the sword master for House Corrino

programme.title: Dune: Prophecy
programme.desc: Following a tragedy, the young Tula worries about being accepted despite her family name, while a sceptical Valya struggles with the decision to take the Sisterhood vow. Years later, Valya receives a message that confirms her suspicions, and Tula mourns a loss

programme.title: Dune: Prophecy
programme.desc: After nearly all the acolytes have the same nightmare, Tula attempts to understand the origins of their disturbing dreams. Meanwhile, on the eve of the great Landsraad meeting, Valya sets her plan in motion to redeem House Harkonnen, Ynez confronts her father about rumors surrounding Desmond, and Kieran conspires to advance a rebel attack that the Sisterhood must try to thwart

programme.title: Dune: Prophecy
programme.desc: As Corrino names a new Bashar, a Sister with deep connections to the emperor arrives on Salusa Secundus, sending ripples through the royal house. After receiving a tip, Desmond goes on a warpath to root out the insurgents, while Tula tries to keep her secret project from being discovered by the other Sisters

programme.title: Dune: Prophecy
programme.desc: As Tula contends with the stunning revelation of Desmonds true identity, the acolytes uncover a devastating long-held secret about the Sisterhood. Meanwhile, Valya executes her plan for Ynezs escape, which leads to an epic confrontation with an increasingly powerful Desmond

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: In the town of Ennis, Alaska, the eight men working at the Tsalal Arctic Research Station all disappear. Local police chief Liz Danvers leads the investigation, but state trooper Evangeline Navarro believes it may be linked to an unsolved murder. The return of the crime anthology, starring Jodie Foster and Kali Reis

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: As Danvers and Prior set out to learn more about Tsalal - and find an unlikely location for the physical evidence - Captain Connelly threatens to hand the case over to Anchorage. Later, Navarro and Danvers separately find a connection between one of the Tsalal men and Annie, prompting the former partners to agree to work the case together

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: While Hank leads the search for Clark, Prior asks Danvers about the murder-suicide case that drove a wedge between her and Navarro. After sifting through the contents of Clarks trailer, Navarro and Danvers seek out a local hairdresser for insight on Annie, which leads to a tip about another former Tsalal worker. Later, tensions grow between Danvers and her stepdaughter Leah

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: When Julias mental-health struggles resurface, Navarro takes her to a local facility, promising that this time will be better. Later, Danvers and Navarro confirm the location of Annies murder, while the police chief levies a harsh punishment on Leah following her stepdaughters act of protest

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: As Prior digs into the links between Tsalal and mining company Silver Sky, Navarro rescues Leah from a local protest that has turned violent. At a meeting with Silver Sky executve Kate McKitterick, Danvers balks when Connelly shares the official cause of the Tsalal mens deaths - and gets a warning against pursuing the case any further. Later, Hank receives a quid pro quo offer

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: In the midst of a brutal storm, Danvers and Navarro find themselves stuck at Tsalal with no electricity or means of contact. As the truth about what happened to Annie and the Tsalal men unfolds, Navarro and Danvers each confront the demons from their past.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Drama offering a look at the complexities of life in a social-media obsessed world, starring Zendaya, Jacob Elordi and Sydney Sweeney

programme.title: Heated Rivalry
programme.desc: Rival ice hockey stars Shane Hollander and Ilya Rozanov face an unexpected emotional connection, challenging their professional paths and disrupting the sporting worlds expectations. Romantica drama, starring Hudson Williams and Connor Storrie

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.desc: When Clark and Floyd learn that both their marriages have stalled, they begin to explore a new dating app for extramarital affairs. Black comedy, starring David Harbour, Jason Bateman and Linda Cardellini

programme.title: Heated Rivalry
programme.desc: The captain of the New York Admirals has a life-changing encounter that challenges his public image and the private life hes fought to protect. Drama starring Hudson Williams and Connor Storrie about two ice-hockey players whose on-ice animosity conceals a secret romance between the two

programme.title: Heated Rivalry
programme.desc: After a night together, Ilya lets his guard down, sending Shane into a panic. Shanes relationship with a movie star intensifies the turmoil between them. Drama starring Hudson Williams and Connor Storrie about two ice-hockey players whose on-ice animosity conceals a secret romance between the two

programme.title: Heated Rivalry
programme.desc: Shane confirms Roses suspicions and admits he is gay, but they agree to remain friends. At the 2017 all-star game, Ilya and Shane reconnect and they play on the same team for the first time

programme.title: Heated Rivalry
programme.desc: Kip and his friends watch on TV as Scott discusses his public coming out while accepting the MVP award. Shane drives to his cottage with Ilya, who shares the trauma of his mothers death by suicide

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Documentary following stately home owners who hire out their estates to earn extra income, and the clients who pay to use their properties for functions including stag parties, weddings and hunting trips. The programme explores how the reality of life in Britains grand houses is often less glamorous than it appears, as proprietors struggle to maintain crumbling buildings and pay utility bills, and examines the modern-day divide between domestic staff and their employers. Featuring life at Chillingham Castle, Maunsel House, Carlton Towers and Muncaster Castle

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Lord and Lady Fitzalan Howard, the owners of Carlton Towers near Selby in North Yorkshire, prepare to host a fitness boot camp weekend at their property - while also welcoming an array of guests to celebrate their sons birthday. Meanwhile, Sir Benjamin Slade hopes a murder mystery weekend at Maunsel House in Somerset will help pay off a sizeable electricity bill

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Life in the Devon fishing port of Brixham. Spring is in the air, and the town is a hive of activity as skippers return their pleasure yachts to the water after winter in the dry dock, while the pressure is on for Brixham to look its best for the arrival of Princess Anne, who will officially open the new £20million fish market, and the start of the summer season

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Brixham hosts its annual Pirate Festival, paying tribute to Devons colourful maritime history, while fisherman Nathan sets off in search of a lucrative catch

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Pembleton and Bayliss investigate when a boy is left brain dead after being hit by a stray bullet. Gritty police drama, guest starring Marcia Gay Harden

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: A 10-year-old crime is uncovered when a body is unearthed behind a brick wall. Gritty police drama, following the lives of the detective division on the streets of Baltimore

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Calamity Jane and Doc Cochran care for the little girl who survived the massacre, as suspicions arise that the Indians may not have been to blame. Hickok asks Bullock for protection in a high-stakes poker game, and Tom Mason is determined to exact his revenge. Starring Ian McShane, Timothy Olyphant and Nick Offerman

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Al is furious when Cy Tolliver appears in Deadwood planning to open a rival brothel, and vows to find out who helped the crafty businessman sneak into town. Meanwhile, Brom Garrett confronts the saloon owner over his dud gold claim. Starring Ian McShane, Timothy Olyphant and Molly Parker

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Chuck faces a threat to his new career aspirations, and an important guest pays Taylor a visit. Meanwhile, Wendy and Axe develop a plan to derail Taylors business

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: As Axe Cap suffers an attack at a crucial moment, Taylor considers going into business with an unexpected partner. Meanwhile, Chuck makes a bold move to advance his own career

programme.title: My Brilliant Friend
programme.desc: Lilas condition is worsening and Elena asks her in-laws for advice. Meanwhile, there is increasing union unrest at the Soccavo plant. In Italian

programme.title: The Young Pope
programme.desc: Dussollier blames himself after a tragedy and returns to Honduras, and with Lennys supporters dwindling, he questions whether his papacy is coming to an end

programme.title: Prisoner
programme.desc: Prison transport officer Ambers first day back after maternity sees her escorting ruthless contract killer Tibor Stone to court so he can testify in a high-profile case. When their convoy is attacked by a highly organised unit, Amber handcuffs herself to the prisoner to prevent his escape, but Tibor is a marked man and their assailants will stop at nothing to make sure he does not make it to court. Action thriller, starring Tahar Rahim and Izuka Hoyle

programme.title: Atomic
programme.desc: In Beirut, deep cover CIA agent Cassie Elliott receives a tip off about an exchange of uranium that has apparently just taken place in the city, close to where Max and JJ are now laying low, and decides to investigate. Meanwhile, Max receives evidence that the cartel has kidnapped his girlfriend Laetitia and he must take the statues all the way to Marrakech if he is to save her

programme.desc: When Detective Plumb discovers that Carol has lied about key details of her affair, she presses Homer to let her question Clark. Once in the hot seat, unsettling truths about Clarks relationships with both Floyd and Carol begin to come to light

programme.desc: After meeting at the cornhole party, Clark quickly hits it off with Floyds wife Carol. Later, detectives Homer and Plumb dig deeper into Clarks relationship with Carol, and Floyds time on the DTF app

programme.desc: Calamity Jane and Doc Cochran care for the little girl who survived the massacre, as suspicions arise that the Indians may not have been to blame. Hickok asks Bullock for protection in a high-stakes poker game, and Tom Mason is determined to exact his revenge. Starring Ian McShane, Timothy Olyphant and Nick Offerman

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Al is furious when Cy Tolliver appears in Deadwood planning to open a rival brothel, and vows to find out who helped the crafty businessman sneak into town. Meanwhile, Brom Garrett confronts the saloon owner over his dud gold claim. Starring Ian McShane, Timothy Olyphant and Molly Parker

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Chuck faces a threat to his new career aspirations, and an important guest pays Taylor a visit. Meanwhile, Wendy and Axe develop a plan to derail Taylors business

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: As Axe Cap suffers an attack at a crucial moment, Taylor considers going into business with an unexpected partner. Meanwhile, Chuck makes a bold move to advance his own career

programme.title: My Brilliant Friend
programme.desc: Lilas condition is worsening and Elena asks her in-laws for advice. Meanwhile, there is increasing union unrest at the Soccavo plant. In Italian

programme.title: The Young Pope
programme.desc: Dussollier blames himself after a tragedy and returns to Honduras, and with Lennys supporters dwindling, he questions whether his papacy is coming to an end

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Chuck faces a threat to his new career aspirations, and an important guest pays Taylor a visit. Meanwhile, Wendy and Axe develop a plan to derail Taylors business

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: As Axe Cap suffers an attack at a crucial moment, Taylor considers going into business with an unexpected partner. Meanwhile, Chuck makes a bold move to advance his own career

programme.title: Dune: Prophecy
programme.desc: On Wallach IX, young Valya Harkonnen promises Mother Superior Raquella that shell protect the Sisterhood by putting one of their own on the imperial throne. Thirty years later, on Salusa Secundus, Valya works to combat a new threat to her long-awaited plan for a marriage between Princess Ynez-Arat and a young Richese prince. Sci-fi prequel, starring Emily Watson, Olivia Williams and Mark Strong

programme.title: Dune: Prophecy
programme.desc: After receiving word about events on Salusa Secundus, Valya brings Theodosia to the Imperial House to help manage the situation. Meanwhile, Desmond makes a confession to Emperor Corrino, Tula reluctantly enlists Lila for a vital mission, and distrust swirls around Keiran Atreides, the sword master for House Corrino

programme.title: Prisoner
programme.desc: Prison transport officer Ambers first day back after maternity sees her escorting ruthless contract killer Tibor Stone to court so he can testify in a high-profile case. When their convoy is attacked by a highly organised unit, Amber handcuffs herself to the prisoner to prevent his escape, but Tibor is a marked man and their assailants will stop at nothing to make sure he does not make it to court. Action thriller, starring Tahar Rahim and Izuka Hoyle

programme.title: Atomic
programme.desc: In Beirut, deep cover CIA agent Cassie Elliott receives a tip off about an exchange of uranium that has apparently just taken place in the city, close to where Max and JJ are now laying low, and decides to investigate. Meanwhile, Max receives evidence that the cartel has kidnapped his girlfriend Laetitia and he must take the statues all the way to Marrakech if he is to save her

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.desc: When Clark and Floyd learn that both their marriages have stalled, they begin to explore a new dating app for extramarital affairs. Black comedy, starring David Harbour, Jason Bateman and Linda Cardellini

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.sub-title: Missouri Mutual Life and Health Insurance Company
programme.desc: Eager to please, Clark ramps up his support for Floyds health and financial wellness, while Carol makes her lover swear to secrecy

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: A 10-year-old crime is uncovered when a body is unearthed behind a brick wall. Gritty police drama, following the lives of the detective division on the streets of Baltimore

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Part one of two. A sniper strikes terror into the hearts of the residents of Baltimore. Gritty police drama, guest starring chat show host Jay Leno

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Part two of two. The officers continue their investigation into the sniper attacks and a copycat killer emerges. Gritty police drama, guest starring chat show host Jay Leno

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Lord and Lady Fitzalan Howard, the owners of Carlton Towers near Selby in North Yorkshire, prepare to host a fitness boot camp weekend at their property - while also welcoming an array of guests to celebrate their sons birthday. Meanwhile, Sir Benjamin Slade hopes a murder mystery weekend at Maunsel House in Somerset will help pay off a sizeable electricity bill

programme.title: Until Dawn (2025)
programme.desc: A year after their friend disappeared, a group find themselves trapped in a time loop, where they are hunted and killed unless they survive until dawn. Video game-inspired horror, starring Ella Rubin, Michael Cimino and Odessa Azion

programme.title: The Damned (2024)
programme.desc: A 19th-century widow must make an unimaginable choice when, during a cruel winter, a foreign ship sinks off the coast of her fishing village. Horror mystery, starring Odessa Young, Joe Cole, Siobhan Finneran and Rory McCann

programme.title: Tootsie (1982)
programme.desc: A New York actors difficult reputation has rendered him unemployable. When a TV soap advertises a new female role, he disguises himself as a woman for the audition - and wins the part. But the character proves so popular, he is forced to keep up the pretence indefinitely. Comedy, starring Dustin Hoffman, Jessica Lange and Bill Murray. Directed by Sydney Pollack, who makes a cameo appearance as Hoffmans agent

programme.title: The Witches of Eastwick (1987)
programme.desc: Three single women dabble in magic to conjure up the perfect lover, and unintentionally summon Satan himself, who seduces them one by one. They come to realise the danger the lecherous devil presents and decide to end their relationships, but the infernal rogue does not take kindly to rejection. Fantasy comedy based on John Updikes novel, with Jack Nicholson, Cher, Michelle Pfeiffer and Susan Sarandon

programme.title: Weird Science (1985)
programme.desc: Two sexually frustrated teenagers use their computer to design the perfect woman, but are ill prepared for the outcome when their creation comes to life. She decides to make men of them, by putting them in a series of situations that will force them to stand up for themselves. John Hughes sci-fi comedy, starring Kelly LeBrock, Anthony Michael Hall, Ilan Mitchell-Smith, Robert Downey Jr and Bill Paxton

programme.title: Ferris Buellers Day Off (1986)
programme.desc: A teenager plays truant from school and spends the day dragging his girlfriend and a reluctant friend into all manner of crazy adventures in the big city - while the schools dean of students vows to stop at nothing to prove the youngster is faking illness. Comedy, starring Matthew Broderick, Mia Sara, Alan Ruck, Jennifer Grey, Jeffrey Jones and Charlie Sheen

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad! (1988)
programme.desc: While investigating the shooting of a colleague, disaster-prone police lieutenant Frank Drebin uncovers a plot to assassinate the Queen during her visit to Los Angeles. However, after he is sacked from the force by the mayor, the cop has to operate beneath the radar to get to the bottom of the conspiracy. Comedy, with Leslie Nielsen, Priscilla Presley and Ricardo Montalban

programme.title: Uncle Buck (1989)
programme.desc: An unreliable but good-natured slob is called upon to look after his trouble-making nephew and nieces while their parents are away - and what starts as a disaster soon changes for the better as the unlikely babysitter gets to grips with the finer points of being a responsible adult. Family comedy, starring John Candy, Macaulay Culkin, Jean Kelly, Gaby Hoffman, Amy Madigan and Laurie Metcalf

programme.title: Planes, Trains and Automobiles (1987)
programme.desc: A stressed businessman just wants to make it home to spend Thanksgiving with his family. However, when his flight is forced to land miles from its destination, he finds himself sharing a disaster-strewn journey across America with an amiable but slobbish salesman. Comedy road movie, starring Steve Martin, John Candy, Laila Robins, Kevin Bacon and Michael McKean

programme.title: The Man with Two Brains (1983)
programme.desc: A brilliant surgeon escapes the heartache and frustration of his failing marriage by falling in love with a bottled human brain - but needs to find a suitable body to implant it in. Science Fiction comedy, starring Steve Martin, Kathleen Turner, David Warner and Paul Benedict, while Sissy Spacek provides the voice of the doctors beloved brain.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers (1980)
programme.desc: Two criminal brothers discover the orphanage where they were raised faces closure unless the nuns who run it can pay their tax bill, so the pair embark on an urgent mission to revive their old blues band to raise the money needed. Comedy, starring John Belushi, Dan Aykroyd, Aretha Franklin, James Brown, Ray Charles, Cab Calloway, Carrie Fisher, John Candy and John Lee Hooker

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap (1984)
programme.desc: An ageing British rock band try to revive their fortunes by embarking on a US tour, with a film-maker on hand to record the mayhem. However, the big comeback soon turns into a series of disasters as tensions between the clueless rockers and their long-suffering manager reach breaking point. Spoof documentary, starring Michael McKean, Christopher Guest, Harry Shearer and Rob Reiner

programme.title: The Big Chill (1983)
programme.desc: Seven old friends are reunited when they gather for the funeral of a former fellow college student. Over the course of a weekend together, they reflect on the dead mans demise and how their attitudes to life have changed since they last met, reminiscing on the faded idealism of youth. Drama, starring Glenn Close, Tom Berenger, Kevin Kline, Jeff Goldblum, William Hurt and Meg Tilly

programme.title: The Natural
programme.desc: A baseball prodigys dreams of sporting stardom are cut short when he gets shot. Once he has recovered from his injuries, he rejoins his team as a rookie recruit at an age when most players are thinking of retiring - only to enjoy an unexpected run of success. Drama, starring Robert Redford, Glenn Close, Kim Basinger, Robert Duvall and Barbara Hershey

programme.title: Caddyshack (1980)
programme.desc: A host of weird and wacky characters cause mayhem at an exclusive golf club, including a laid-back professional player, an obnoxious millionaire, the snobbish club president, a motley collection of teenage caddies and a psychotic groundskeeper engaging in a fight to the death with a canny gopher. Comedy, starring Chevy Chase, Bill Murray, Michael OKeefe and Rodney Dangerfield

programme.title: The Blues Brothers (1980)
programme.desc: Two criminal brothers discover the orphanage where they were raised faces closure unless the nuns who run it can pay their tax bill, so the pair embark on an urgent mission to revive their old blues band to raise the money needed. Comedy, starring John Belushi, Dan Aykroyd, Aretha Franklin, James Brown, Ray Charles, Cab Calloway, Carrie Fisher, John Candy and John Lee Hooker

Spoof documentary, starring Michael McKean, Christopher Guest, Harry Shearer and Rob Reiner

programme.title: Trading Places (1983)
programme.desc: Two billionaire brothers engineer the downfall of a high-flying stockbroker, while giving a homeless conman all the advantages of wealth, as part of a bet to see whether heredity or upbringing determines character. Comedy, starring Dan Aykroyd, Eddie Murphy, Jamie Lee Curtis, Ralph Bellamy, Don Ameche and Denholm Elliott

programme.title: See No Evil, Hear No Evil (1989)
programme.desc: A blind man and his deaf friend go on the run to clear themselves of a trumped-up murder charge. However, all kinds of oddball characters are on their trail, determined to get hold of a top-secret microchip that the duo do not realise they have. Comedy, starring Richard Pryor, Gene Wilder, Kevin Spacey, Joan Severance, Alan North and Anthony Zerbe

programme.title: Fatal Attraction (1987)
programme.desc: A married lawyer has a one-night stand with a business associate while his wife and children are out of town. He hopes to keep his infidelity a secret, but she is determined to continue the relationship, and begins obsessively stalking him and his unsuspecting family. Thriller, starring Michael Douglas, Glenn Close and Anne Archer

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part III (1989)
programme.desc: The teenage martial arts expert becomes obsessed with defending his championship title, but wise mentor Mr Miyagi is not prepared to help him fight for such a shallow goal. Seeking someone else to help guide his career, he falls under the influence of a crooked trainer - who is secretly plotting his downfall with the help of an old adversary. Adventure sequel, starring Ralph Macchio and Pat Morita

programme.title: Birdy (1984)
programme.desc: A young soldier devastated by his nightmarish experiences in the Vietnam War is committed to an Army mental hospital. He comes to believe he is a bird, and dreams of taking his fantasy to the logical, ultimate conclusion - by learning to fly. Alan Parkers psychological drama, based on William Whartons novel, with Matthew Modine, Nicolas Cage, John Harkins, Karen Young and Sandy Baron

programme.title: Amadeus (1984)
programme.desc: Composer Antonio Salieri is a favoured artist in the court of Austrian emperor Joseph II, but he finds himself pushed aside in favour of Mozart. Salieri admires the younger maestros music, but is incensed that someone so vulgar and obnoxious should be gifted with such talent. As jealousy consumes him, he plots his rivals downfall. Period drama, adapted by Peter Shaffer from his own play and starring F Murray Abraham and Tom Hulce

programme.title: Eddington (2025)
programme.desc: A stand-off between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbours are pitted against each other in Eddington, New Mexico. Modern-day Western, starring Joaquin Phoenix, Emma Stone and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues (2025)
programme.desc: Nigel Tufnel, David St Hubbins and Derek Smalls reunite after a 15-year break for one final concert. Their progress is charted once more by documentary maker Marti DiBergi, who offers perhaps too much perspective on their new direction. Comedy sequel, written by and starring Michael McKean, Harry Shearer, Christopher Guest and director Rob Reiner, in his final film. Kerry Godliman and Chris Addison also star with cameos by Paul McCartney, Elton John and Garth Brooks

programme.title: Dont Lets Go to the Dogs Tonight (2025)
programme.desc: An eight-year-old girl experiences life on her familys Rhodesian farm during the final stages of the Bush War. Drama, written, directed by and starring Embeth Davidtz, with Lexi Ventner and Zikhona Bali

programme.title: Caught Stealing (2025)
programme.desc: Former baseball player Henry Hank Thompson foolishly agrees to cat-sit for British neighbour Russ, and walks unwittingly into the middle of a turf war between warring factions. Director Darren Aronofskys comedy thriller, starring Austin Butler, Zoe Kravitz and Matt Smith

programme.title: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey (2025)
programme.desc: New York bachelor David is due to drive to his friends wedding, but a wheel clamp on his vehicle derails those plans. He acquires a new drive from the mysterious Car Rental Company managed by two nameless agents, who are oddly familiar with his dating history. At the wedding, David meets fellow singleton Sarah and squanders an opportunity to dance with her. On the way home, the rental cars GPS asks him if he would like to embark on a big bold beautiful journey. When David agrees, the virtual assistant guides him to Sarah and they follow a winding route between physical doors that open into episodes from their respective pasts. Romantic drama, starring Colin Farrell and Margot Robbie

programme.title: Wuthering Heights (2026)
programme.desc: Catherine Earnshaw is raised by her alcoholic father at a Yorkshire farmhouse, with Nelly Dean as a constant companion. Mr Earnshaw acquires an orphaned boy named Heathcliff during one of his gallivants and gifts the waif to Cathy as her pet. The children become inseparable, and as adults they embark on a destructive relationship. Writer-director Emerald Fennells drama based on Emily Brontes romance, starring Margot Robbie, Jacob Elordi and Martin Clunes

While she pleads innocence, school principal Andrew Marcus seeks answers along with police officer Paul Morgan. Horror, starring Julia Garner, Josh Brolin and Alden Ehrenreich

programme.desc: Former US Army Reserve officer Jeffrey Manchester executes a plan to rob multiple branches of McDonalds. He is eventually captured by police and becomes the first person to escape from Brown Creek Correctional Institution in North Carolina. Jeffrey hides out at a toy shop for several months, and during forays outside the building, he sparks romance with store worker Leigh Wainscott. Comedy drama, starring Channing Tatum, Kirsten Dunst and Peter Dinklage

programme.desc: Simon and Conrad get a surprise while working the graveyard shift in Reading. Dan and Daz pursue the driver of a Ford Focus who is determined to escape justice, and the police helicopter is called in to help catch a burglar with a death-wish

programme.title: Send in the Dogs
programme.desc: Londons Metropolitan Police dog unit tests the skills of its leading specialist search dogs, pitting spaniels Diesel and Billy against each other as they hunt for hidden heroin. On the streets of north London, shift leader Pete Madden puts his Alsatian Brodie in the line of fire when they target two armed robbers, but as the trail runs cold they find themselves in pursuit of a gang of car vandals. Ken Stott narrates

programme.desc: Two men on a motorbike target a jewellery shop in Andover, Hampshire, and golfers are annoyed after their clubs are stolen. Presented by Dominic Littlewood

programme.desc: A vulnerable woman does not receive the care she needs in a nursing home, and a man stealing from cars gets more than he bargained for. Presented by Dominic Littlewood

programme.desc: Dominic Littlewood reveals how a one-man crime wave hit a quiet town, and also learns about the new technology police are using to defeat the latest tricks cunning criminals have come up with to steal money at cashpoints

programme.title: Mind Over Murder
programme.desc: Four years after Helen Wilsons murder, investigator Burt Searcey makes a breakthrough in the case, as police start to piece together the victims final hours

programme.title: Mind Over Murder
programme.desc: Decades after the trial of the Helen Wilson murder case, Joseph Whites fight for DNA testing brings new details to light

programme.desc: Documentary celebrating the life and career of the actor, who rose from obscurity to become a 1990s heart-throb and pop culture icon. With contributions from Stephen Baldwin, John McNaughton, Jason Priestley, Marisol Nichols and Gabriel Correa

programme.desc: Archaeologists and anthropologists make discoveries that receive little notice because they fail to fit into the accepted scientific paradigm, such as an ancient hammer found in Texas or elongated skulls found on nearly every continent

programme.desc: A focus on the widespread belief in astrology, the spread of astronomical knowledge and how the revolutionary ideas of Ptolemy, Copernicus and Galileo reshape our ancient skies

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies
programme.desc: In 1997, over the city of Phoenix, Arizona, one of the most spectacular mass UFO sighting of all time took place. Thousands of people witnessed a series of bright orange orbs moving in formation silently overhead. Despite hours of video and photographic evidence this case remains unexplained. Craig and space journalist Sarah Cruddas talk to eyewitness nurse David Parker who provides a vivid description of his close-up encounter with a huge boomerang-shaped UFO that passed directly overhead. They also investigate the response by the authorities in the days following the UFO event

programme.title: Conspiracy Files: Unsealed
programme.desc: A look at the locations of stargate portals around the world, which some people believe to be doorways to wormholes in time

programme.title: Conspiracy Files: Unsealed
programme.desc: An insight into the secrets surrounding the 10 biggest and most mysterious conspiracies in history, including the goings-on at Area 51

programme.title: Blown Away
programme.desc: The eight glassblowers are asked to create an original cartoon character made completely out of glass. An angry vacuum, a reclusive imp and other colourful creatures emerge from the artists imaginations

programme.title: Blown Away
programme.desc: Seven glassblowers sweat it out in the hot shop as they create climate change art aimed at inspiring hope. A new twist on an old glass working technique stuns everyone, but cracks start to appear in the competition and the pieces in the gallery

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Ancient astronaut theorists who suggest that aliens have been guiding mankind in secret to bring about huge leaps in technological advancement

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise and Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: A fresh look at the Third Reich from a global and current perspective, telling how the Nazis conquered Germany and then half of Europe within a few years of losing the First World War. This first episode recounts how the clash of right-wing and left-wing political convictions turned the Weimar Republic into a powder keg. The fascist movement then seized power in Italy in 1922

programme.title: Lost U-Boats of WWII
programme.desc: Racing an incoming hurricane, Darrell Miklos and his team are forced to make tough choices. After a season-long search, they locate the source of the massive magnetometer hit recorded at Target 4

programme.desc: Aston Villa v West Ham United (Kick-off 1.00pm). Coverage of the Womens Super League match from Villa Park. The reverse fixture back in October saw Villa score two quick-fire second-half goals thanks to Kirsty Hanson and Lynn Wilms, as they came away from Chigwell Construction Stadium with a 2-0 victory. That win moved the hosts up to eighth in the table while West Ham were stuck at the bottom of the table without a point to their name

programme.desc: The broadcaster explores the Galapagos, a collection of volcanic islands in the Pacific known for its extraordinary wildlife. programme.desc: Exploring how whale sharks drive the culture of Santa Maria, the only European hotspot for these giants and why warming seas may be drawing them in

programme.title: Worlds Most Toxic Animals
programme.desc: First of two programmes about some of earths most dangerous creatures, which lurk in the oceans, the forests, swamps and deserts. In Australia, meet the worlds most venomous snake, and in nearby oceans, discover the deadly nature of the marine creatures that share these tropical waters

programme.title: Worlds Most Toxic Animals
programme.desc: Exploring more of earths dangerous creatures, beginning in the South American rainforest with the poison-packed golden dart frog, which harbours enough poison to kill 10 men. Plus, a visit to Sydney, Australia, home of the worlds most venomous spider

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Global Adventure
programme.desc: Documentary capturing some of the greatest filming sequences of David Attenboroughs career, using previously unseen footage, from the deepest dives in a submersible on the Great Barrier Reef to watching a million bats take off in a cave in Borneo. Other highlights include life in the frozen tundra of South Georgia, a colony of King Penguins and the worlds largest migration of Hammerhead sharks in the Galapagos Islands

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Global Adventure: Home Planet
programme.desc: Further footage of David Attenboroughs global wildlife adventures, from the depths of the Great Barrier Reef to the ancient rainforests of Borneo

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Global Adventure: The Rise of Nature
programme.desc: The broadcaster explores the rise of life on Earth, from the emergence of the first creatures on seabeds hundreds of millions of years ago to the wildlife of today

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: Following his visit to the Great Barrier Reef in 1957, naturalist and broadcaster David Attenborough returns and uses the latest filming techniques to unlock the secrets of the natural wonder. In the first edition, he descends beneath the waves at night and uses cutting-edge technology to generate computer scans of the sea floor. He also learns about a complex community of animals, as well as the annual coral spawning, which is responsible for the great diversity in the reef

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: Using the latest technology, the naturalist explores the shark-infested waters of Osprey Reef in the Triton submersible, before returning to the nesting grounds of the Green Sea Turtle, 60 years after his first visit to Raine Island. He also marvels at manta ray cleaning stations on Lady Elliot Island, and tracks dwarf minke whales to discover their surprising reasons for returning, and why the reef is vital for their survival

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The naturalist examines what the next few decades may hold for this remarkable ecosystem, and looks at the work of scientists who are trying to preserve the area and the species that inhabit it, assisted by research vessel the Alucia. He also embarks on an ambitious attempt to dive further into the reef than ever before to witness the resilient coral that live down in the depths and see if they hold answers that may help to overcome challenges that lie ahead, as the impact of humans on the reef continues to take its toll

programme.title: Dawn to Dusk
programme.desc: Mothers Day on the Indian subcontinent, which in Sri Lanka signals the beginning of the dry season and in India marks the end of it. For one female Bengal tiger, the time has come to train her cubs to hunt, while the lions and cobras of the subcontinent get serious about mating season

programme.title: Bears of the Karawank Mountains
programme.desc: Documentary following a young male brown bear on his adventures in a mountain range that forms a natural border between Slovenia and Austria

programme.title: Deep in the Heart
programme.desc: A celebration of Texan wildlife, showing the world through the eyes of catfish, ocelots and other native creatures and discovering how conservation efforts can save habitats. Narrated by Matthew McConaughey

programme.title: In for the Kill
programme.desc: Footage of one of the most dramatic moments in nature - a predator claiming its prey, revealing how these creatures have adapted to achieve epic feats of speed, cunning and agility

programme.title: The Hungry Games: Alaska Big Bear Challenge
programme.desc: A look at how bears of Alaskas Katmai National Park bulk up for hibernation over 150 days, battling the elements and each other

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: Sierra Gorda in Mexico, one region made up of many worlds - from the low hill of a semi-desert to the lush green clouds of a forest teeming with wildlife

programme.title: Bears of the Karawank Mountains
programme.desc: Documentary following a young male brown bear on his adventures in a mountain range that forms a natural border between Slovenia and Austria

programme.title: Dawn to Dusk
programme.desc: Mothers Day on the Indian subcontinent, which in Sri Lanka signals the beginning of the dry season and in India marks the end of it. For one female Bengal tiger, the time has come to train her cubs to hunt, while the lions and cobras of the subcontinent get serious about mating season

programme.title: Colombias Wild Coast
programme.desc: The remote island of Gorgona, once chosen by the Colombian government as a prison site due to its shark-infested seas and impenetrable jungle teeming with deadly snakes

programme.title: Colombias Wild Coast
programme.desc: On the island of Providencia, a young female black crab undertakes a life-or-death hike to escort her 80,000 eggs from the mountain down to the sea

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: The Sonoran Desert is a forgotten, foreboding place. With its towering volcanic peaks and almost other-worldly craters, its conditions push animal life to the limit

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison attempts to rescue a squirrel monkey, who proves to be an escape artist. Newly arrived orang-utan youngster Kayan meets Bulu Mata for the first time

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: The park comes to the aid of two marmosets and Alison is shocked by the males condition

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.desc: The diverse marine life along the coastline of Mozambique, attracted to the nutrient-rich water. But even these behemoths are vulnerable to rampant over-fishing

programme.title: Guardians of the Wild
programme.desc: The work of people saving and protecting Zambias animals and parks, beginning with the rescue of a trio of elephant orphans

programme.title: Dogs: An Amazing Animal Family
programme.desc: Biologist Patrick Aryee embarks on a journey through the canine family tree, beginning by exploring how dogs came to be domesticated and kept as pets

programme.title: Wildlife Icons
programme.desc: Once abundant on the continent, elephant populations have been drastically reduced in the last 200 years. Yet there are pockets of hope for these gentle giants

programme.title: Moon: Natures Secret Force
programme.desc: A look at the effect of the Moon on life on Earth, including how predator and prey live and die by lunar rules as moonlight reveals or conceals lifes nightly battle for survival

programme.title: Fast and Furious (2009)
programme.desc: News of a friends murder brings international fugitive Dominic Toretto back to his home city of Los Angeles in search of revenge. It is not long before his pursuit leads him to cross paths with FBI agent Brian OConner, and despite their hostile feelings toward each other, the pair work together to bring down those responsible. Thriller sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Paul Walker, Michelle Rodriguez and Jordana Brewster

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious (2003)
programme.desc: A disgraced former cop is arrested by the FBI for illegal street racing, but his one-time colleagues offer him freedom in exchange for going on an undercover mission. Teaming up with an old racing friend and a customs official, he has to infiltrate and bring down a drug-trafficking operation. Thriller sequel, with Paul Walker reprising his role from The Fast and the Furious alongside Tyrese Gibson, Eva Mendes and Cole Hauser

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview - May 2026
programme.desc: A look ahead at the films to enjoy this month on Sky Cinema

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift (2006)
programme.desc: An American teenager is sent to live with his father in Tokyo after a brush with the law, but soon becomes involved in illegal street racing. When he ends up owing money to gangsters after losing a race against a driver with Yakuza connections, he has to learn to master the Japanese style of driving to win and pay back his debts. Action adventure, starring Lucas Black, Nathalie Kelley and Bow Wow

programme.title: Fast and Furious (2009)
programme.desc: News of a friends murder brings international fugitive Dominic Toretto back to his home city of Los Angeles in search of revenge. It is not long before his pursuit leads him to cross paths with FBI agent Brian OConner, and despite their hostile feelings toward each other, the pair work together to bring down those responsible. Thriller sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Paul Walker, Michelle Rodriguez and Jordana Brewster

programme.title: Fast and Furious 5 (2011)
programme.desc: Criminal Dominic Toretto is broken out of prison by his partners in crime and together they flee to South America. They begin assembling a gang of crooks to carry out a heist in Rio, but the FBIs top manhunter is in the country and hot on their trail. Action adventure sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson, Paul Walker and Jordana Brewster

programme.title: Fast and Furious 6 (2013)
programme.desc: A gang of fugitives is reunited by an FBI manhunter, who offers the criminals pardons in return for their help. They must go to Europe and bring down a criminal syndicate led by a ruthless London gangster, whose right-hand woman is an old friend of theirs assumed to be dead. Action thriller sequel, with Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson and Michelle Rodriguez

programme.title: Fast and Furious 7 (2015)
programme.desc: After defeating Owen Shaw and his crew and securing amnesty for their past crimes, Dom, Brian and the rest of the team return home to live normal lives again. However Shaws older brother Deckard - a rogue special forces assassin vows revenge on Dom, who he holds responsible for leaving Owen in a coma. Action thriller sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Jason Statham and Paul Walker in his last film role

programme.title: Fast and Furious 8 (2017)
programme.desc: Street racing criminal Dominic Toretto is drawn out of retirement by an encounter with a ruthless cyberterrorist, who recruits him for an international criminal scheme. As he sets out to steal the technology she needs to unleash chaos on the world, he is drawn into conflict with both old enemies and his former gang. Action adventure sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Charlize Theron, Dwayne Johnson and Kurt Russell

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious (2001)
programme.desc: In a move to identify suspected hijackers, an undercover police officer infiltrates the high-octane world of illegal late-night street racing by rival gangs. He is befriended by a champion driver, but when he also forms a bond with the racers sister, he is pitched into a conflict of loyalties. Thriller, starring Vin Diesel, Paul Walker, Michelle Rodriguez and Jordana Brewster

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick is seemingly killed by Baron Samedi, and his friends brave the zombie outbreak across Portland to recover his body. However, the occult detective soon rises from the grave. David Giuntoli stars

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Adalind continues her quest to regain her powers. Monroe, Hank, Rosalee and Juliette track down Nick, but find he seems trapped in a partly zombified state. Meanwhile, Captain Renard does his best to clean up the zombie fallout both domestic and international

programme.title: From
programme.desc: Panic spreads through town as the residents face a chilling new threat to their survival, while Jim realises the magnitude of the mistake he made by enlisting Randall in his cause

programme.title: From
programme.desc: Boyd fears he may have finally run out of answers as the residents of the town prepare for the end, while Tabitha clings to the belief that the children could be the key to their salvation

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and a team of investigators visit Somerset to search for spooky activity at Taunton Castle, where the spirit of a merciless judge is thought to linger

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team visits the Exeter Old Courts, where many lawbreakers were sentenced to death, including the notorious Bideford witch

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and the team return to Edinburgh to investigate the Niddry Street Vaults, where stories abound of witches, poltergeists and an evil misogynist

programme.title: Doomsday Meteor (2023)
programme.desc: A massive meteor threatens to destroy planet Earth, so scientists try to stop it with high-powered lasers. Sci-fi thriller, starring Patrick Labyorteaux, Joseph Michael Harris and Anthony Jensen

programme.title: Megalodon: The Frenzy (2023)
programme.desc: After a team of scientists on an experimental energy rig accidentally release five gigantic sharks from beneath the ocean floor, the crew of the USS King are left to save the day. Sci-fi action starring Eric Roberts

programme.title: Arctic Armageddon (2023)
programme.desc: As global temperatures plummet, scientists must figure out a way to save humanity from entering another ice age. Sci-fi thriller, starring Patrick Labyorteaux, Joe Finfera and Lindsey Marie Wilson

programme.title: Jurassic Attack (2013)
programme.desc: A group of soldiers crash land in an unfamiliar jungle which is inhabited by a group of long hidden dinosaurs. Adventure, starring Gary Stretch

programme.title: DC Down (2023)
programme.desc: After an earthquake rocks the capital, the Army Corps race against time to rescue the President, who is trapped in the collapsed White House. Thriller, starring Jack Pearson

programme.title: Escape from New York (1981)
programme.desc: Former special forces soldier Snake Plissken is sentenced to life on Manhattan Island, an anarchic penal colony for the most dangerous criminals. When Air Force One is hijacked and crashes there, Snake is coerced into rescuing the US president from prisoners holding him hostage. John Carpenters sci-fi action adventure, with Kurt Russell, Donald Pleasence, Lee Van Cleef, Adrienne Barbeau and Isaac Hayes

programme.title: Stephen Kings Needful Things (1993)
programme.desc: A mysterious antiques dealer opens a quaint shop in the small town of Castlerock, and his fascinating wares are soon the hearts desire of many of the residents. However, the stranger does not want money for his stock. Instead, the customers have to pay a higher price as he goads them into turning on one another in return for what they want. Horror, based on Stephen Kings novel, starring Ed Harris and Max von Sydow

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: As the group debates the next course of action, Rick wanders after a lost friend. Meanwhile, the Governor restores order in Woodbury and makes plans to punish those responsible. Post-apocalyptic drama following the exploits of a former County Sheriff struggling to survive in the aftermath of a zombie epidemic, starring Andrew Lincoln

programme.title: Alien Apocalypse (2005)
programme.desc: An astronaut doctor Ivan Hood and his fellow astronaut Kelly return from their mission in space to find the world has been taken over by aliens. Now Dr. Ivan Hood and Kelly must lead a revolution to free the human slaves from their alien masters

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: First-ever episode of the Star Trek spin-off, set 100 years before the original series, a time when space exploration is in its infancy. Quantum Leaps Scott Bakula stars as Captain Jonathan Archer, the original skipper of the Starship Enterprise, who leads his crew on their maiden voyage, a mission to return a wounded Klingon to his people

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Chakotay gets stranded on a planet with no means of communicating with Voyager. As war breaks out between two alien races, he becomes drawn into the battle for justice. Drama, starring Robert Beltran

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Part one of two. Daniel Jackson of SG-1 uncovers a pointer to the whereabouts of the Lost City of the Ancients, and Dr Weir prepares her team to venture into the distant Pegasus Galaxy. When they eventually reach their goal, however, they find themselves facing a struggle for survival in a hostile and unfamiliar land. First episode of the spin-off from Stargate SG-1, starring Torri Higginson

programme.title: Fantasy Island
programme.desc: Ruby Akuda, who has a terminal illness, arrives with her husband and is given a new lease of life. Sequel to the 1970s drama, with Mr Roarkes grand niece Elena welcoming visitors to the exotic island where dreams become reality. Starring Roselyn Sanchez

programme.title: Fantasy Island
programme.desc: Two adventurers whose marriage has grown stale want to have the ultimate expedition together, while widower Brent must decide if he is ready to face his grief

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Part three of three. Tealc is forced to undergo a dangerous ritual to free his brainwashed mind from the evil Apophis. Sci-fi drama, starring Christopher Judge and Peter Williams

programme.title: From
programme.desc: Boyd struggles to find a path forward as the town says farewell to one of their own, while Fatimas health takes a turn for the worse and Tabitha finds help from an unlikely ally

programme.desc: Nick and Hank investigate a series of mysterious deaths in which people simply exploded, and discover it may be the consequence of a centuries-long feud. Elsewhere, Monroe and Rosalee talk about moving their relationship a stage further. David Giuntoli and Russell Hornsby star

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: With their security threatened, Rick and the group must make a choice. Woodbury has become a police state, making Andrea uneasy. Post-apocalyptic drama following the exploits of a former County Sheriff struggling to survive in the aftermath of a zombie epidemic. Starring Andrew Lincoln

programme.title: Fantasy Island
programme.desc: Ruby Akuda, who has a terminal illness, arrives with her husband and is given a new lease of life. Sequel to the 1970s drama, with Mr Roarkes grand niece Elena welcoming visitors to the exotic island where dreams become reality. Starring Roselyn Sanchez

programme.title: Fantasy Island

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: As the group debates the next course of action, Rick wanders after a lost friend. Meanwhile, the Governor restores order in Woodbury and makes plans to punish those responsible. programme.title: Grimm

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.desc: Paul Murton tours Outer Orkney, beginning at North Ronaldsay, which may be the most northerly of the Orkneys but turns out to be surprisingly easy to get to. One of the last people to live there joins Paul to recall when it was still a thriving community

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard confronts the man who tormented him in high school, while Penny realises she did her fair share of bullying in the past and calls the people she targeted to apologise. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is uninterested in Amys career, so Penny, Raj and Leonard try to make him understand that sometimes it benefits a relationship to pretend to care about a partners achievements. Howard notices Bernadette is uncomfortable around children when she helps him perform a magic show at his nephews birthday party

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard asks Penny out on a date, and they agree to give their relationship another chance. They soon remember why it did not work out in the first place, but end up sleeping together anyway. The 100th episode of the comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny continue testing their rekindled relationship using an innovative system to report discrepancies. Howard and Bernadette begin to worry when Raj starts treating his new phone like a person, while Sheldon and Amy try to achieve internet fame by creating a video podcast about flags

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After a sleepless night, Leonard breaks his room-mate agreement with Sheldon. Howard makes preparations to go on a flight to the International Space Station and enlists Rajs help to ensure he gets a cool astronaut nickname

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon uses his holidays to help Amy in her biology lab, but moans about the menial jobs he is given - until she asks him to dissect a brain. Penny grows curious about Leonards attitude to marriage when Bernadette asks Howard to sign a pre-nuptial agreement

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Raj and Howard devise a contest to decide whether Sheldon or Kripke should get Professor Rothmans vacant corner office. Meanwhile, Penny receives the gift of a painting from Amy to celebrate their friendship, but discreetly tries to dispose of it with help from Bernadette

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon refuses to get his hair cut as his regular barber is in a coma - a solitary change that causes chaos in the rest of his well-ordered life. Meanwhile, Howard undergoes a gruelling Nasa training programme in Houston, Texas, meaning he can only communicate with Bernadette via the internet

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: The couple need everyone to be on their best behaviour when the adoption agency schedules a home visit

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: The couple try to speed up the adoption process, prompting Molly to pray with Peggy at church, while Mike visits Carls psychic

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: As everyone gathers for the birth of Mike and Mollys adopted child, the couple reflect on their relationship and past events. Last-ever episode of the comedy, starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Race of Superhumans and a Letter to Alf
programme.desc: Missy unknowingly becomes Sheldons test subject when he agrees to help her with her maths homework, while Georgie joins Marys bible study group to spend more time with a girl he has his eye on

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Tummy Ache and a Whale of a Metaphor
programme.desc: When Sheldon becomes ill and spends a few days in hospital, he turns into the worlds worst patient. His behaviour takes a toll on everyone, and Missy gets a taste of what her life would be like if she didnt have a twin

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Nuclear Reactor and a Boy Called Lovey
programme.desc: The young genius tries to build a nuclear reactor to power the neighbourhood. A university cocktail party gets heated when Dr Sturgis colleague, Dr Linkletter, flirts with Meemaw, and Georgie is heartbroken when he learns Veronica has a boyfriend

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is disappointed with Sheldon when he announces he is breaking his promise to go with her to a birthday party in favour of joining the boys for a Star Wars video-game marathon. Comedy, starring Mayim Bialik and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny buys Leonard and Sheldon some Star Trek action figures, but the duo refuse to remove them from the packaging in case their value is diminished. Elsewhere, Raj is desperate to find someone to accompany him to a wedding and asks his parents to find him a date. Featuring the guest voice of Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard is put in charge of looking after Stephen Hawkings wheelchair when the famous scientist comes to lecture at the university for a week - and takes advantage of his position to blackmail Sheldon into performing assorted unpleasant tasks. Guest starring Stephen Hawking

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon and Raj organise a stag party for Howard, but stories about his sexual history are unwittingly revealed, and he has to persuade bride-to-be Bernadette not to call off the wedding. Comedy, starring Simon Helberg and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard tries to use his wedding as an excuse to avoid being sent into space, but ends up accepting the mission. Amy plots to get Sheldon to take the next step in their relationship, while Leonard accidentally asks Penny to marry him

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As Howard and his fellow astronauts sit in the space shuttle awaiting launch, he reflects on the tumultuous events of the previous few days, when he and Bernadette tried to get married. Meanwhile, his friends witness the blast-off on TV at home

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Despite being on the International Space Station, Howard gets caught in a strange argument between Bernadette and his mother via video link. Elsewhere, Raj feels lonely while his best friend is away and ends up interfering with Sheldons and Leonards dates. Comedy, starring Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny tells the girls she is unsure about her relationship with Leonard and is considering breaking up with him, but when Sheldon finds out, he tries his best to change her mind. Meanwhile, on the International Space Station, Howard is being bullied by the other astronauts. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Sister Wives
programme.desc: Kodys apology to Christine starts well but gets tense when David brings up Kodys relationships with his kids. Janelle seeks guidance from Meri.

programme.title: Sister Wives
programme.desc: Kodys apology to Meri gets tense, as she doubts his sincerity, challenging his comments. Janelle asks her church for a spiritual release from Kody.

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Dr Lee treats a man who has large growths on his nose that impair his breathing. Meanwhile, Marie has an unsightly lump on her forehead

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Tim has a massive growth on his back that affects his ability to work and socialise. Meanwhile, a mother and daughter have bonded over their bodies

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Tracis confidence was destroyed after years of bullying about the bumps that have plagued her face for 20 years, while Ravon has a unique dangling growth on his leg

programme.title: My 600lb Life

programme.desc: Bride-to-be Samantha wants a dress that shows off her tattoo, but her mother is not impressed. Meanwhile, singer Vanessa needs a 1930s-style dress for her jazz-inspired wedding

programme.title: Cruel Passion (1977)
programme.desc: Two sisters are expelled from a nunnery and are plunged into a life of debauchery. While one embraces her new lifestyle, the other is desperate to cling to her old morality and sees a hope of salvation in a mysterious aristocrat who harbours a hidden dark side. Historical drama based on the novel Justine by the Marquis de Sade, starring Koo Stark and Martin Potter

programme.title: Can You Keep it Up for a Week? (1974)

programme.title: Highclere: The Real Downton Abbey

Lady Carnarvon becomes an unexpected tour guide for some Americans whove turned up expecting a private tour of the famous castle. programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a renowned calypso singers husband. Neville believes it is poison since the paramedics found blue traces on the mans fingers, but there are several lines of inquiry to follow. Ralf Little and Don Warrington star

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: In Saint Barnabas, Naomi attends the wedding of her best friend Monique. However, the jollity of the day comes to an abrupt halt when Rex, the estranged husband of Moniques mother Odette, is fatally stabbed. Knowing the case requires full investigation, Naomi calls the team for help. Meanwhile, Marlon tries to prepare for his sergeant exams but is easily distracted. Ralf Little, Don Warrington and Shantol Jackson star

programme.title: Death in Paradise

programme.title: Death in Paradise

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Vincent Petit, the former resident of a childrens home, meets a grisly end while revisiting the establishment to deliver a speech about how his time there helped shape his life. Darlene and Marlon track prime suspect Marianne, who was spotted at the scene with a knife in her hand. At the bar, Selwyn meets daughter Andrina for the first time. Ralf Little, Don Warrington and Ginny Holder star

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Neville receives an anonymous letter telling them a murder is about to be committed. Not long after, he and Naomi are called to the harbour when a body is pulled from the ocean. The victim suffered blunt trauma and it is soon suggested that his disgruntled wife may be a person of interest. Marlon returns after taking a short holiday following his disappointing exam results. Sun-kissed detective drama, starring Ralf Little, Don Warrington and Ginny Holder

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Following Nevilles arrest on suspicion of killing David Cartwright, DI Karen Flitcroft from the Department of Policing Standards arrives to investigate. CCTV footage shows an agitated Neville visiting the victim shortly before he was found dead, which as far as Flitcroft is concerned proves his guilt - so she advises the team members that if they are convinced of their inspectors innocence, they must prove it quickly. Robert Webb guests stars in the crime drama, with Ralf Little

programme.title: Death in Paradise

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A feature-length special to conclude the anniversary celebrations, which stretches from a grey, damp and drizzly London all the way to the sparkling beauty of idyllic Saint Marie. A wealthy shipping magnate is found dead at a Christmas party. Things get stranger when a man in London receives a mysterious Christmas card connected to the victims death. Danny John-Jules makes a return as charismatic Officer Dwayne Myers, with special guests Mathew Baynton, Juliet Stevenson, Stanley Townsend, Jocelyn Jee Esien, Anthony Calf, Tessa Bonham Jones, Elizabeth Tan, Tariq Jordan and Sara Cox joining the regular cast

programme.desc: As the Kembleford Amateur Dramatics Society prepares to put on a pantomime, a grim incident from the groups past is unearthed. A body is found in the woods and identified as a woman who went missing from a rehearsal seven years previously. An examination of the corpse provides evidence that a man who confessed to the murder was innocent, leaving Father Brown with a miscarriage of justice to put right in time for Christmas. Crime drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: A woman with amnesia is found stumbling out of a Native American reservation with severe head injuries, leading the agents to discover three dead bodies. They conclude she was the intended fourth victim but managed to escape, so Jane uses post-hypnotic suggestion on her to try to flush out the killer. Elsewhere, Hightower gives Rigsby and Van Pelt an ultimatum. Crime drama, starring Simon Baker

programme.title: Hudson and Rex
programme.desc: After a counterfeit money operation is busted, Charlie interrogates criminal kingpin Rupert Mankiewicz for leads during his prison transfer

Pilot episode of the crime drama, starring Poppy Montgomery and Dylan Walsh

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: DI Goodman is called in to investigate the death of former surgeon Emma Redding at a retirement home. With an empty packet of sleeping pills beside her body and her room locked from the inside, it looks like an open-and-shut case of suicide. However, the team discovers everything is not as it seems and mounting evidence suggests she may in fact have been poisoned. Then, a blast from Humphreys past arrives unexpectedly on the island, and looks set to distract him from solving the case. Guest starring Rupert Vansittart, Joanna David, Phil Davis and Michele Dotrice

programme.sub-title: In the Footsteps of a Killer

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The amateur sleuth struggles to protect those closest to him when an old foe is unexpectedly released from prison. Mark Williams stars
